step2_verification.qa_pairs:
1. [SUPPORTED] Q: Does the document associate the domain "www.igrejaatos2.org" with threat-actor activity (e.g. phishing, C2, or impersonation)?
   A: Yes, the document associates the domain "www.igrejaatos2.org" with threat-actor activity, specifically mentioning that it is a "deceptive download domain" used to lure victims into downloading a fake offline version of ChatGpt and subsequently obtaining the malicious executable RedStealer.
2. [SUPPORTED] Q: Does the document associate the domain "cdn.discord" with threat-actor activity (e.g. phishing, C2, or impersonation)?
   A: Yes, the document mentions that the malware downloads an executable from "cdn.discord" in Stage 2 of its execution.
